analysis_commentary: IMPROVED on the balanced goal. au_max=9 and au_fin=9 — NEW all-time record (previous 8). max_prob=0.235 — much safer margin below the 0.90 goal threshold (previous 0.84 was close). im=0.141 slightly worse than 0.085 but still vastly better than pre-regime 0.29. Net collapse-prevention is stronger (safer max) while learning diversity is broader (higher au). No promotion.
